creator: royger@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to kpielorz from comment #15)
Right, I don't think the messages are an issue by themselves, but I would like to get rid of them. In this last patch that I've posted (and that you have been testing), could you try to re-add the "inittodr(time_second);" line in the xentimer_resume resume function?

TBH, I'm still not sure why those messages just popped up now, and I would like to figure out which change is making them appear.

Thanks, Roger.
